---
title: ""
date: last-modified
execute:   
  freeze: auto  # re-render only when source changes
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    highlight-style: pygments
---

# EFSPI statistical methodology leaders

## Introduction

In September 2023 EFSPI founded a new group _EFSPI statistical methodology leaders_, bringing together methodology leaders to work on topics of common interest.

Find more context in this [linkedin post](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/kasparrufibach_biostatistics-statistics-drugdevelopment-activity-7084613881087578113-teIX/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop) and [this slidedeck](material/20230913_EFSPI_methodology_group_linkedin.pdf).

## Members 

A list of current members is available [here](methods_members.html).

## Previous events

Materials from events the methods leaders contributed to are available [here](events.html).

## Priority topics 

See [here](priority.html).

## Newsletters

- [3rd March 2025](20250304_news.html)
- [14th February 2026](20260214_achievements2025.html)
- [12th June 2026](20260612_news.html)

## List of publications by the group

See [here](publications.html).

# Feedback 

For feedback and questions send an email to [efspieurope@gmail.com](efspieurope@gmail.com).
